Vegan Jjajangmyeon
Serves 4 to 6

Ingredients

For the Shiitake Mushroom Broth
1 cup hot water
5 dried shiitake mushrooms

For the Veggies
1 1/2 Tbsp chopped garlic (approximately 4 to 5 cloves)
1 Tbsp hopped fresh ginger
1/4 cup chopped green onions (approximately 2 to 4 green onions)
1 large onion, cut into large chunks (approximately 10 oz)
1/4 of green cabbage, cut into large chunks (approximately 8 oz)
1 large zucchini, cut into cubes (approximately 12 oz)
4 to 5 baby portobello mushrooms (approximately 4 oz)

For Stir Fry
2 Tbsp cooking oil
1/3 cup black bean paste, Chunjang (you can substitute to white or red miso if you prefer.)
1 Tbsp unrefined raw sugar
2 Tbsp vegetarian oyster sauce
1 Tbsp cornstarch
Black or white pepper to taste

To Serve
Dried udon noodles (3 oz per serving)
Julienned cucumbers

title: La diferencia entre cГ©lula animal y vegetal que todos confunden
description:
Este vГӯdeo educativo de Academia Internet explica las semejanzas y diferencias entre las cГ©lulas animales y vegetales, ambas clasificadas como eucariotas (con nГәcleo verdadero).
Semejanzas clave (0:36 - 2:02):
Ambas poseen membrana plasmГЎtica, citoplasma y ribosomas.
Comparten orgГЎnulos como el nГәcleo (con el nuclГ©olo), la mitocondria (para producir energГӯa ATP), el retГӯculo endoplГЎsmico y el aparato de Golgi.
Diferencias clave (2:03 - 7:35):

CГ©lula Vegetal: Cuenta con cloroplastos (para la fotosГӯntesis), una gran vacuola central para almacenamiento y mantenimiento de la turgencia, y una pared celular rГӯgida de celulosa. TambiГ©n presenta plasmodesmos para conectar cГ©lulas vecinas.
CГ©lula Animal: Presenta lisosomas (para la digestiГіn celular), centriolos (precursores de cilios y flagelos) y carece de pared celular.
El vГӯdeo concluye resumiendo la estructura eucariota y la importancia de estos orgГЎnulos para la vida celular.

title: EASY VEGAN COOKIE RECIPES
description:
Download Best Fiends for FREE: http://Download.BestFiends.com
Thanks for much for watching! I hope you all enjoyed these 3 vegan cookie recipes. Check below for full recipes :).

Subscribe to my second channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCL4XJVj4PPOdecb2J5w3z8A

Download my Simple Vegan Eats Ebook here: 
https://www.livshealthylife.com/shop/

RECIPES:
Snickerdoodles:
1/2 cup vegan butter
1 cup sugar
1/4 cup non-dairy milk
splash of vanilla
2 cups flour
1 tsp baking powder
1 tsp baking soda

sugar + cinnamon to roll them in.
Bake at 350F/180C for 10-12 minutes

Vegan Nutella Cookies (the brand I use is Nutiva):
1/4 cup vegan butter
1/4 cup vegan Nutella or homemade chocolate hazelnut butter
1 cup sugar
1/4 cup non-dairy milk
2 cups flour
1 tsp baking powder
1 tsp baking soda
handful of non-dairy chocolate chips

bake at 350F/180C for 10-12 minutes.

Salted Chocolate Pretzel:
1/2 cup vegan butter
1 cup sugar
1/4 cup non-dairy milk
splash of vanilla
2 cups flour
1 tsp baking powder

title: RAW VEGAN CHEESECAKE
description:
Open for the recipe to this easy, delicious, no bake, healthy, raw, vegan cheesecake!


Crust:
1 cup medjool dates
1 cup almonds
1/4 cup coconut

Filling:
2 cups soaked cashews
1 cup maple syrup
1 can of full fat coconut milk
1 lemon
Vanilla
Salt

Toppings:
Fruit, nuts, seeds, chocolate, whatever you want!

(You can also use a food processor instead of a blender)
I used a 6 inch pan but you can use a bigger one and double the recipe if you want! 
When you're done making the cake let it sit in the freezer for at least 4 hours. When you're ready to serve, take it out of the freezer about 15 minutes before to thaw out a bit. Store leftovers in the freezer again :)
I hope you guys enjoyed this recipe and I'd love to know if you try it out! xx Elizabeth

title: Ensalada de Quinoa рҹҘ—рҹҚҡ | Recetas Veganas | Lidl EspaГұa
description:
Ensalada de Quinoa con vinagreta рҹҘ—рҹҚҡ | Recetas Veganas | Lidl EspaГұa  
Receta de quinoa con aderezo de hierbabuena y chГӯa. 
https://recetas.lidl.es/Receta/Ensalada-de-quinoa

Raciones: 4 | Dificultad: fГЎcil | Tiempo preparaciГіn: 30 minutos

Ingredientes:

- 150 g de quinoa ecolГіgica Golden Sun
- 300 ml de agua
- 80 g de rГәcula
- 100 g de judГӯas verdes Freshona
- 1 mango
- 5 hojas de hierbabuena
- 45 ml de aceite
- Sal
- Zumo de ВҪ lima
- 10 g de chГӯa ecolГіgica Golden Sun
- Pipas peladas Alesto

ElaboraciГіn:

1. Lavamos la quinoa con agua, la cocemos durante 15 minutos y mezclamos con la rГәcula. 

2. Cortamos las judГӯas en aritos, el mango en dados y rehogamos en una sartГ©n con aceite. AГұadimos las judГӯas y el mango a la mezcla de quinoa y rГәcula.

3. Escaldamos en agua hirviendo las hojas de hierbabuena durante 10 segundos y enfriamos en agua con hielo. En un vaso para batir, batimos la hierbabuena con el aceite, la sal y el zumo de lima.

4. Colamos, aГұadimos la chГӯa y volvemos a batir.

VEGAN SPANISH TORTILLA | Healthy Vegan Recipe | With Potatoes & No Eggs
A very typical and essential recipe from Spain, this vegan Spanish tortilla is really tasty and easy to make. Made with potatoes and absolutely no eggs, it has all the flavor and the texture of this great classical dish of the Spanish cuisine.
Besides, it's low fat and very healthy!

VEGAN SPANISH TORTILLA

INGREDIENTS:

- 2 medium Potatoes
- 1 medium Onion
1/2 Red Pepper

LIQUID PART:

7 tbsp Chickpeas flour
14 tbsp Water
1 tbsp Apple vinegar
1 tsp Garlic powder
1 tbsp Onion powder 
Pepper & Salt at taste
Optional:
-   1 tsp Kala Namak (black salt of the Himalaya)
1 tbsp smoked Paprika

PROCEDURE: 
-   Cut the potatoes in small pieces
Cut the onion in not so small pieces
Cut the red pepper in medium to small pieces
Reserve
Prepare the liquid part by mixing all the ingredients in a bowl
Reserve
Put the potatoes in a frying pan first, since they take longer to cook
As soon as they get soft and golden add the onion and the red pepper
When the onion gets soft and shiny weвҖҷll put these ingredients in the same bowl where we mixed the liquid part
Now, letвҖҷs put it back in the frying pan, and spread all the ingredients as fast as we can
While it start to cook, make sure the edges get round with the help of a spatula
When the shape is all set, letвҖҷs cover the frying pan and let it cook for 10 minutos over medium heat
After that, flip it with the help of a plate, put it back in the pan, and let it cook for 10 minutes more
Let it cool down for a while before you cut it
Enjoy! I do not own the rights to this music.

title: Inside LondonвҖҷs first all vegan supermarket вҖ“ where an egg substitute powder costs ВЈ7
description:
GreenBay is LondonвҖҷs first 100% vegan supermarket, which sells products that are sourced and selected from all over the world.

"Everything here is vegan. If you come here obviously you don't have to worry about looking at the ingredients," co-founder Paula Alcalde told Business Insider UK.

The supermarket has its own "vegan meat and cheese" section, where a block of cheese is sold for around ВЈ5. Meat substitutes are vegan versions of bacon, steaks, and sausages.

There's also an egg substitute which costs ВЈ6.99. It's a powder you whisk in ice cold water.

None of the products in the cleaning and body care aisle have been tested on animals. You can find a ВЈ2.49 4-pack of toilet paper or a ВЈ7.95 deodorant.

"We are ethical. We really care about this thing. We want the movement to move forward," co-founder Anderson Caicedo told Business Insider UK. "We are doing this because we want to do it, rather than just making money."

title: Vegan Spanish Style Cod Fish
description:
This recipe is a classic in Mexico and Spain. It has a unique flavor and I could recreate it using cabbage instead of fish. It is a true vegan delicacy! Besides being cruelty free, you don't have to worry about sharp bones yucky cartilage. I couldn't get enough of this dish when I made it. 

Ingredients: 

- 1 cup cooking olive oil 
- 1 garlic head, peeled, finely chopped 
- 1 piece onion, chopped 
- 1/2 cup almonds, peeled, chopped  
- 10 medium Roma tomatoes 
- 8 cups cabbage, shredded 
- salt to taste 
- 1 cup parsley, chopped 
- 12 petite potatoes, boiled 
- seedless olives to taste 
- 2 tbsp capers, chopped 

Procedure: 

- Heat up a half a cup of the olive oil on medium fire and fry the garlic in it. Make sure it doesn't get burned. 
- When it's lightly golden brown, turn the fire off. Set aside.

title: Die Wahrheit Гјber Veganismus - 30 Tage Vegan Selbstexperiment
description:
Veganismus ist der ErnГӨhrungstrend schlechthin: Es gibt mittlerweile 1,3 Millionen Veganer in Deutschland, und es werden immer mehr. Aber was sind eigentlich die GrГјnde vegan zu leben? Ist das wirklich gesГјnder und besser fГјr die Umwelt, oder doch nur ein Trend, mit dem Geld gemacht wird? Und natГјrlich vor allem: Wie schwer ist das eigentlich, vegan zu leben?

title: Cocina vegana: Milanesas de champiГұones | Sale el Sol
description:
La chef Natalia Delgado prepara una deliciosa milanesa de champiГұones con papas y ensalada, un platillo vegano y muy saludable que debes probar

Milanesa de champiГұones

Ingredientes:
1tz. De garbanzos cocidos 
1tz. De champiГұones picados
1/2 cebolla picada finamente 
1 diente de ajo rallado
2cdas. De perejil picado
1cda. De orГ©gano
1/2tz. De avena pulverizada
2cdas. De salsa inglesa 
1cda. De mostaza 
1cta. De sal 
1cda. De chia +2cdas. De agua 
Pan molido
Aceite de oliva para freГӯr 
Para servir:
Ensalada verde
Papas fritas 

Procedimiento:
En un sartГ©n a fuego medio agregue dos cucharadas de aceite de oliva, agregue la cebolla y los champiГұones, cocine por 3 min. agregue sal al gusto, reserve.
En un tazГіn coloque los garbanzos y machaquelos hasta formar un purГ©, agregue los champiГұones sofritos, ajo, perejil, orГ©gano, avena, salsa inglesa, mostaza y sal, mezlce y agregue la chia, forme milanesas con la mezcla y pase por el pan molido, caliente un sartГ©n y agregue aceite, cocine 2 min

title: Meat and Potato Pie | Hollands Meat Pie Review
description:
Meat and Potato Pies are quite traditional in Northern England, and especially in Lancashire. While it wouldn't pass muster with the clean/healthy eating brigade, a meat and potato pie is perfect comfort food on a cold winter evening. One legendary brand of Potato and Meat Pies is Hollands Pies. Hollands have made pies in Lancashire since 1851, and their pies are sold in chip shops and at football matches across the North of England. In this video, I do a quick taste test of a Holland's Pie, and then I make my own meat and potato pie from scratch. It's quite easy and utterly delicious.

The written recipe is here: https://keefcooks.com/meat-and-potato-pie-recipe/

title: 9 Excelentes Sustitutos De La Carne Roja
description:
Hola nuevamente amigos de NUTRIMEDIA en este nuevo video hablaremos de 9 alimentos alternativos para evitar la carne roja en ti dieta.
La carne es la fuente principal de proteГӯnas. Pero hay ocasiones en las que el comer carne es perjudicial para nuestro organismo y salud en general. Por esta razГіn, veremos algunas alternativas sustitutas para asГӯ evitar su consumo
1. Productos de soja: La soja se usa cada vez mГЎs como una buena opciГіn para evitar la carne. Frecuentemente se emplea para preparar platos vegetarianos. Son una fuente fundamental de proteГӯnas, por eso se encuentra entre tantas preparaciones como sustituto de la carne (por ejemplo, las hamburguesas)..
2. el Huevo: Es una de las alternativas mГЎs utilizadas para evitar comer carne. Dependiendo del tamaГұo del huevo puede contener de 5 hasta 9 gramos de proteГӯnas. El huevo permite la elaboraciГіn de una gran variedad de platos, lo que hace mГЎs placentero su consumo. 
  3. El atГәn: otra de las grandes opciones para evitar la carne

title: Why McDonald's Doesn't Have A Vegan Meat Burger In The US
description:
As consumer diets continue to shift toward healthier food, plant-based alternatives are becoming more and more popular. Fast-food chains like Burger King, White Castle, and Carl's Jr. are rolling out fake meat options. But will Mcdonald's - the world's most famous fast-food restaurant - jump on board?

In the 12 months ending in March 2019, restaurant operators increased purchases of plant based protein 36 percent. That's in an environment where foot traffic in restaurants has remained relatively flat since 2014.

Traditional veggie burgers started popping up on grocery store shelves in the 1980s. Restaurants added them to their menus as an easy option for vegetarian diners. But veggie burgers have also gotten a bad rap. Made with black beans, lentils or tofu, they don't really taste like a real burger. In fact, they're usually pretty tasteless. 

Beyond Meat and Impossible Foods are trying to change that. Their plant-based burgers mimic actual beefвҖҷs taste, texture and look. The Beyon

title: EASY Vegan Cheese Recipe ***ONLY 2 INGREDIENTS***
description:
LEARN HOW TO MAKE VEGAN CHEESE WITH 2 INGREDIENTS!

LAY HO MA everyone!  You're in for the ultimate treat.  Join me in this episode on how to make easy vegan cheese.  In fact, you only need two ingredients.  This vegan cheese is perfect for spreading on crackers, breads, and much more!

Ingredients:
2 1/2 cups of cashew milk
*if making cashew milk, blend 1/4 cup cashews with 2 cups water
2 tbsp lemon juice

Directions:
1. Heat up the cashew milk in a saucepan on medium heat.  Do not boil.
2. Add the lemon juice, and gently incorporate 
3. Turn off the heat, and let the mixture cool for 15-20min
4. Place a sieve onto a large mixing bowl and line the sieve with cheese cloth or a nut milk bag
5. Pour the mixture into the milk bag, and gently strain out some of the water
6. Fill a mason jar up with water, and place it on the bag to act as a weight
7. Place in fridge overnight
8. That's it!!

El carbГіn vegetal o carbГіn activado se obtiene generalmente a partir de las partes leГұosas carbonizadas de ГЎrboles y arbustos que son sometidas a procesos especiales que tienen como finalidad aumentar su grado de porosidad.
TambiГ©n es frecuente su obtenciГіn a partir de la cГЎscara del coco, 

Desde el punto de vista quГӯmico 
se trata de un carbГіn prГЎcticamente puro, con una estructura cristalina reticular similar a la del grafito.
DespuГ©s de su carbonizaciГіn, se somete a una preparaciГіn especial que aumenta su porosidad conп¬ҒriГ©ndole un fuerte poder de adsorciГіn.

En EspaГұa estГЎ su uso vГӯa oral el carbГіn vegetal estГЎ autorizado para el tratamiento sintomГЎtico de los procesos diarreicos inespecГӯficos  y como para el alivio sintom

El carbГіn vegetal o carbГіn activado se obtiene generalmente a partir de las partes leГұosas carbonizadas de ГЎrboles y arbustos que son sometidas a procesos especiales que tienen como finalidad aumentar su grado de porosidad. En EspaГұa estГЎ su uso vГӯa oral el carbГіn vegetal estГЎ autorizado para el tratamiento sintomГЎtico de los procesos diarreicos inespecГӯficos  y como para el alivio sintomГЎtico de los gases. title: How Plant-Based Milk Flooded The Market
description:
Alternative meat might be having a moment. Beyond Meat's trading debut quickly became the best-performing IPO of 2019. But alternative milk has been around for a lot longer, and it's forced the $107 billion dairy industry to evolve.

consumers have their choice between almond milk, rice milk, oat milk, hemp milk, coconut milk and soy milkвҖ”you get the idea. Americans are drinking less and less milk now that store shelves are flooded with more and more options.

 Paul Ziemnisky, EVP of global innovation at Dairy Management Inc., which represents dairy farmers, told CNBC in a phone interview that fluid milk, however, remains in 94 percent of households. He added that the dairy industry is finding ways to innovate through new flavors and products like Fairlife, a high-protein milk brand distributed by Coca-Cola.

"The plant-based guys like to poke and grab at just one number of a category, but we have strong pockets of growth," he said, adding that Fairlife has seen strong revenue numbers.

title: Tarta de manzana y avena sin horno, sin lactosa, bajas calorias lista en 15' rГЎpido, fГЎcil y barato
description:
Como hacer una tarta de avena y manzana, fГЎcil, rГЎpido y barato, sin horno, sin lactosa, baja en calorias y con muy pocos ingredientes, una receta fГЎcil, rГЎpida y deliciosa.

#RECETASFACILES
#POSTRESINHORNO
#TARTAMANZANAAVENA
#SOUECOCINA

Postre bajo en calorias de avena:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mGJmX9rBzCM

Ingredientes:
10 cucharadas de avena instantanea
1 cucharada de polvo de hornear
1 huevo
2 cucharadas de stevia
2 cucharadas de aceite
7 cucharadas de jugo de naranja
1 manzana

Ingredients:
1 large onion

5-6 cremini mushrooms

4. Roughly chop the celery and add to the pot.  Dice the apple and add to the pot
5. SautГ© for another 5-8min
6. Dice the potato and slice the mushrooms.  Add them to the pot followed by the pink salt
7. Add about 10g of kombu to the pot followed by
